jsonLd.title: Shyaway is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Shyaway invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shyaway:
Shyaway is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shyaway!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
